speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul sunn hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur emotional flooding ho rahi hai
text: Main aaj office mein baithi hoon par dimaag bilkul sunn hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur presentations ke baare mein sochna namumkin lag raha hai. Itni zyada emotional flooding ho rahi hai ki lag raha hai main har jagah fail ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feeling quality of overwhelm as per Lens F for Sequential coping.
text: Aapka dimaag abhi bilkul sunn lag raha hai aur andar se itna heavy feel ho raha hai ki rona ruk nahi raha... yeh overwhelm bahut bhari lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, office ka laptop samne hai par focus zero hai. Kal raat se hi yeh emotional flooding ruk nahi rahi. Aisa lag raha hai jaise mere wajood se sabko problem hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time duration of the feeling using Lens D.
text: Kal raat se hi aap is bojh ko akele utha rahi hain, aur focus karna practically impossible ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sasu-maa se behas hui thi kal raat. Unka kehna hai ki meri working lifestyle ki wajah se nanad ke rishtey thukraye ja rahe hain. Bol rahi thi ki 'log kya kahenge' ki bhabhi hi ghar par nahi tikti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict using Lens C, kept shorter due to stigma cue.
text: Nanad ke rishton ka aana aur 'log kya kahenge', is sab ka connection aapke kaam karne se joda ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har jagah fail ho rahi hoon
text: Wahi toh. Main yahan WFH ya office dono manage karti hoon, par sasural mein sirf meri absence dikhti hai. Lagta hai main bhabhi, patni, employee... har jagah fail ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a gentle question based on the mirrored fear of failing everywhere.
text: Itna sab kuch ek saath manage karne ke baad bhi jab yeh sunna padta hai ki aap har role mein fail ho rahi hain, toh us waqt andar kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki maine padhai aur career banakar koi gunaah kar diya hai. Dimaag sunn pad jata hai ki ab kisko kya jawab doon. Mera independent hona unke liye embarrassment ban gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence/implication using Lens E.
text: Aapko mehsoos ho raha hai ki aapki sari mehnat aur independence unke liye garv ki jagah ek embarrassment ban chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Jab bhi ghar pe baat hoti hai ki bhabhi working hai, toh ajeeb sa silence ho jata hai. Mere apne gussa hone ke haq ko daba kar bas quiet resignation hi bachta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core emotion of quiet resignation specific to C3 + Sequential.
text: Lagta hai ek deep quiet resignation aa gayi hai andar, jahan lagta hai ki apni baat rakhne ka koi fayda hi nahi hai, kyunki aapki pehchaan hi unke liye samasya ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad mujhe hi adjust karna chahiye. Job chhod doon kya? Warna log toh kahenge hi. Kaafi guilt feel hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue with a shorter restatement, ending softly.
text: Is guilt aur pressure ki wajah se aap apne career aur identity ko chhodne ka sochne par majboor ho rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apna job chhodna nahi chahti. Yeh meri mehnat hai. Par sasural ke taane bardasht nahi hote. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki main apni space kaise bachaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural reality of working women in metros managing traditional expectations.
text: Aap bilkul sahi keh rahi hain. Aaj ke time pe ek working bhabhi ko apne sasural aur office, dono ko balance karna ek ankahe bojh jaisa hota hai, aur isme thak jana ya guilt feel karna aapki galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kya sabhi working auraton ko aisa hi face karna padta hai? Mujhe lagta tha ki modern families samajhti hain, par 'log kya kahenge' ki aage sab peeche reh jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalising the experience of working women facing rishta blame.
text: Working women ki life mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — aap akeli nahi hain. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki ghar ki izzat aur rishton ka pressure hamesha aurat pe daal diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab thoda halka feel ho raha hai ki yeh sirf meri failure nahi hai. Par ab kya karoon main? Office ka kaam pending hai aur mera dimaag abhi bhi bhari hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-effort actionable steps to ground her back into her work safely.
text: Dekhiye, abhi aage ka lamba mat sochiye. Do chhote options hain: ya toh agle 10 minute sirf aankhein band karke pani pee lijiye bina screen dekhe, ya fir kisi colleague ko bol dijiye ki aap aadhe ghante ke liye offline hain. Kaun sa theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pani wali baat theek lag rahi hai. Laptop band karke bas 10 minute apni saanson par dhyaan deti hoon. Kaam ka kya hoga, thodi der baad dekh lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle yeh karo: laptop ka lid down kardo aur phone side rakh do. Phir ek glass thanda pani piyo, aur bas apni chair pe relax karke baitho. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik hai, maine laptop band kar diya. Aisa lag raha tha jaise mujhe kisi ne permission di ho rukne ki. Kabhi kabhi bas khud ko saans lene ka waqt dena zaroori hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the situation structurally as a socio-cultural expectation rather than her personal flaw.
text: Sahi baat hai. Hamare system mein nanad ke rishtey ka pressure aksar bhabhi ki duty par shift kar diya jata hai kyunki society expect karti hai ki aurat hi compromise kare. Yeh unka structure hai, aapka failure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunkar thodi himmat aayi. Main sham ko sasu-maa se ladaai nahi karungi, par apna kaam bhi nahi chhodungi. Dono cheezein alag rakhne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her resolution using Lens D to reinforce the shift.
text: Aaj shaam ko aap us debate mein dobara enter na karke, bas apni space maintain karne ka soch rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main chup rahungi par iska matlab ye nahi ki main agree kar rahi hoon. Main apne office ka kaam ab shuru kar paungi shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gentle check-in about starting work again.
text: Kaam shuru karne ka khayal ab pehle jaisa sunn aur overwhelming toh nahi lag raha na?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle se behtar hai. Emotional flooding thodi settle ho gayi hai. Abhi bas pehli presentation dekhti hoon, baaki baad mein manage karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her practical next step using Lens B.
text: Aapne apne role ko aaj ke liye chote hisso mein baat liya hai, ek time pe bas ek presentation.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, wahi theek rahega. Kabhi kabhi kisi aese insaan se baat karna bahut madad karta hai jo aapko judge na kare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassuring her that her feelings are valid and normal.
text: Sach mein, bina judgement ke apni baat keh pana bahut bada relief hota hai, khaaskar jab 'log kya kahenge' ka pressure har jagah ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Waise, kya aise situations ke liye koi lambe time ka solution hota hai? Jab roz-roz yahi sunna pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving gentle long-term options, mentioning professional support properly framed.
text: Aise lambe time ke issues ke liye apni energy bachana zaroori hai. Ek option hai din mein apne liye 15 minute ka 'no-contact' time nikalna. Dusra yeh ki agar yeh pressure lagatar rahe, toh kabhi counseling bhi ek safe space de sakti hai baaton ko process karne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Counseling shayad theek rahe, par sasural mein isko alag tarah se dekhte hain log. Main abhi pehle wala hi try karungi, apna 15 minute ka time.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her choice and the stigma reality.
text: Mujhe samajh aata hai ki ghar pe usko leke kaisa darr ho sakta hai, isliye abhi apne 15 minute wale plan par hi focus rakhna ekdum theek hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Main abhi apna laptop wapas open kar rahi hoon. Presentation ki formatting se shuru karungi bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final checking question to ensure readiness.
text: Chhote steps se shuru karna hamesha easy hota hai, kya presentation open karte waqt ab saansein normal lag rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, abhi dimaag thoda shant hai. Main kal fir connect karungi agar mujhe zaroorat padi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmly with Lens F mirror.
text: Andar thodi shanti aayi hai yeh jaan kar mujhe bhi accha laga; aap jab chahein yahan waapas aa sakti hain baat karne.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gehra andhera mehsus ho raha hai aur flood of emotions
text: Main itni ghabrahat mein hoon ki subah se laptop khola hai par ek shabd bhi nahi padh paa rahi, bas ek gehra andhera mehsus ho raha hai. Flood of emotions itna tez hai ki samajh nahi aa raha is ghutan se kaise bahar niklu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feeling quality of overwhelm (Lens F) as per Sequential coping rules.
text: Yeh jo gehra andhera aur emotions ka flood aap mehsus kar rahi hain, woh sach mein bahut overwhelming lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, screen ke saamne baithi hoon par dimaag bilkul blank hai. Bas ek ajeeb si restlessness hai aur andar hi andar ghutan badhti jaa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time duration of sitting with the feeling using Lens D.
text: Subah se aap is screen ke saamne is bhari ghutan ko akele bardaasht kar rahi hain bina kuch process kar paye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Asal mein raat ko pati ke sath bina resolution ke jhagda khatam hua tha... unhone saaf keh diya ki meri career ambition parivaar ki 'izzat' se badi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict now that the stressor has surfaced, using Lens C.

text: Bilkul! Khaas kar jab nanad ke rishtey baar-baar laut rahe hon. Unhe lagta hai meri working lifestyle ki wajah se rishta rejection ho raha hai. Meri kya galti hai isme?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence implied by the family's accusations using Lens E.
text: Aapko dar lag raha hai ki un sab rishta rejections ka poora blame aapke kaam aur aapke wajood par daal diya jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh ho raha hai. Main apna 100% deti hoon office aur ghar dono jagah, par phir bhi main hi villain hoon. Bahut ghutan hoti hai is ghar mein ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a gentle question based on her words to explore the feeling of suffocation deeper.
text: Jab aap apna poora effort daalti hain dono taraf aur phir bhi saara blame aap par aata hai, toh us ghutan ke baare mein andar kya mehsus hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki mere sapne kabhi matter hi nahi karte. Bas ek chup chap sehne wali aadat si ban gayi hai, jahan meri aawaz ka koi matlab hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame she uses to justify her silence using Lens B.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural reality of working women navigating 'izzat' in the Hindi belt.
text: Main samajh sakti hoon ki ek working woman hone ke naate, izzat aur career ke beech pisna aur guilt mehsus karna kitna exhausting hai. Yeh aapki koi personal kami nahi hai, balki hamari society ka structure hi aesa hota hai jahan dual burden humesha aurat par aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton se thoda halka lag raha hai. Mujhe lagta tha ki main hi galat kar rahi hoon job karke aur in sab cheezon ko feel karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalising the dual burden and silencing of working women.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-effort actionable steps to ground her right now.
text: Abhi itna aage ka mat sochiye. Do bahut chote options hain: ya toh 5 minute ke liye laptop band karke bas balcony mein paani pi lijiye, ya ek paper par apni sari ghutan likh kar use phaad dijiye. Dono mein se kya try karna chahengi abhi?

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the situation structurally as patriarchy rather than her personal flaw.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main is baat ko apne zahan mein rakhne ki koshish karungi jab pati raat ko wapas is topic par aayenge. Par aaj raat ka soch kar ghabrahat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her fear of the upcoming conflict using Lens E.
text: Aapko fikar ho rahi hai ki aaj raat phir se wahi conflict aur taane shuru na ho jayein jo aapko mentally drain kar dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main dobara us behas mein nahi padhna chahti. Meri energy zero hai. Main bas apni space kaise maintain karu bina kisi bad jhagde ke?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering practical de-escalation tips fitting her boundary needs.
text: Agar behas shuru ho, toh aap calmly keh sakti hain ki 'hum is baare mein kal baat karenge jab dimaag shant ho'. Ya phir aap simply bol sakti hain ki thakan bahut hai aur kal jaldi kaam shuru karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat taalna shayad theek rahega. Main bas bol dungi ki mujhe kal subah jaldi uthna hai aur baat abhi nahi karni. Yeh thoda feasible lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her chosen boundary method using Lens C.
text: Aap raat ko unke sath confrontation thoda defer karke apne liye ek safe aur calm distance banaye rakhna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Mujhe apna dimaag bachana hai apne career ke liye kyunki yahi mera base hai. Is constant pressure ke liye professional help lena kaisa rahega aage chalkar?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Introducing professional help properly framed around cost/stigma.
text: Hamari society mein counseling ko lekar kaafi jhijhak hoti hai aur stigma hai, par jab izzat aur rishton ka burden lagatar chale, toh kisi expert se akele mein baat karna ek safe aur private space deta hai. Ya fir abhi ke liye aap roj raat ko apne thoughts phone ke locked notes mein likh sakti hain.
